---
name: Adaptor request
about: Propose a new adaptor for a domain not covered by the shipped five
title: "[ADAPTOR] "
labels: adaptor, enhancement
---

## Domain

<!-- What domain does this adaptor serve? Be specific — "B2B SaaS feature work in regulated EU markets" beats "SaaS". -->

## Why a new adaptor and not a custom shared-context

<!-- Adaptors generalise across teams. Shared-contexts are project-specific. Why is your domain
     general enough to warrant an adaptor that ships with the plugin? Is anyone outside your
     team likely to use it? -->

## Stakeholder list (proposed)

<!-- 6-9 default stakeholders. For each, write a one-sentence lens.
     See docs/adaptors.md for examples and common mistakes. -->

- **<stakeholder_id>**: <one-sentence lens>
- ...

## Methodology focus (proposed)

Emphasise:
- ...

Deprioritise:
- ...

## Contradiction emphasis (proposed)

**Now horizon:**
- ...

**Mid horizon (6-12 months):**
- ...

**Long horizon (2+ years):**
- ...

## Source quality filters

Prefer:
- ...

Avoid:
- ...

## Proposed example run

<!-- An adaptor without an example run is hard to evaluate. If you have run the pattern
     with a draft of this adaptor, describe what came out and link to the brief. If not,
     describe a hypothetical project the adaptor would serve. -->

## Are you contributing the adaptor yourself?

<!-- Yes / No / Open to collaboration -->
